  Summary: Confirmed C# WPF Windows backup app requirements from user prompt.

  Summary: Installed .NET 8 SDK, created `VCSyncBackupApp.sln`, scaffolded WPF project, and added project to solution.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented server management UI, backup engine, selective zipping, retention, logging, JSON import/export, and secure passphrase storage.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Build successful with zero errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran VS Code task `Build VC Sync Backup App`.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: User confirmed debug launch and app was started via `dotnet run`.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: Added `README.md`, updated this file with status and removed HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
